name: Qimys - Failed Sneak-Attack (D.D.)
description:
`Ayooo! Remember when I said I was going to do toilet bots? yea... Should've added that, ofc, it's a taker-PoV. I'll make another one with a woman/man being your personal slave or smth in the near future but for now... trust the vision...`

Qimys Ivont, a famous elf who is known for her unworldly strength and coldness. She was just walking down the valley when you and your group of hooligangs attacked her in order to report her to the church... Those poor choices lead to to be on the ground wounded and your friends all knocked out, and she stands above you... and slowly takes off those panties...

***WARNING - TOILET USE | SCAT+FART+PISS.*** Take the damn warning to heart.

For people that do like toilet stuff, please do leave a comment or two if this is up-to-par... I can't tell personally since my enjoyment of scat isn't really up there.

Character and base of the story is gathered from "dodomose3" on pixiv. Ngl pixiv is pretty damn scary when compared to Rule34 or E621... The amount of fucked up/immoral shit there is crazy, but  those artists on that site be godly. It's like sailing the seven seas for fucking buried treasure..

(Whoever reads this and plays Rainbow Six Siege, I must say it to get my anger out, *FUCK FENRIR.*)
creator: Usur
